title: Real-time collaboration
description: Plan trips with your crew like a shared canvas. Everyone edits, adds, and reacts at the same time. No more waiting, no more chaos.

title: Discover public trips
description: Browse trips built by travelers around the world. Get inspired, clone any itinerary, and make it your own in seconds.

title: AI trip generator
description: Describe your dream trip and let Tripma build it for you. A full itinerary created instantly, ready for you to customize.

title: Offline access
description: No signal in the mountains? No problem. Your itinerary, maps, and plans are always available offline on any plan.
